creator: frank@dynamical-systems.org
text:
Here is an incremental patch for updating to 4.0.2414. I'm not aware, 
however, if the vulnerability problem has now been fixed.

NB: Version 4.0.2414 requires unmakeself-1.1 to extract.

--- google-earth2.patch begins here ---
diff -Nur google-earth.patched/Makefile google-earth/Makefile
--- google-earth.patched/Makefile	Thu Oct 26 11:05:36 2006
+++ google-earth/Makefile	Mon Nov  6 14:53:31 2006
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	google-earth
-PORTVERSION=	4.0.2091
+PORTVERSION=	4.0.2414
 CATEGORIES=	astro deskutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://dl.google.com/earth/GE${PORTVERSION:C/\..*//g}/
 DISTFILES=	${TARGET_DISTFILE}
@@ -17,8 +17,6 @@
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	unmakeself:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unmakeself
 RUN_DEPENDS=	update-mime-database:${PORTSDIR}/misc/shared-mime-info
-
-FORBIDDEN=	Buffer-overflow vulnerability: http://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/5c9a2769-5ade-11db-a5ae-00508d6a62df.html
 
 RESTRICTED=	Not sure about redistribution rights
 
diff -Nur google-earth.patched/distinfo google-earth/distinfo
--- google-earth.patched/distinfo	Thu Sep 21 20:37:36 2006
+++ google-earth/distinfo	Sun Nov  5 23:16:06 2006
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (GoogleEarthLinux-4.0.2091.bin) = 9bbd6769e7fe00cbf1203c0c8cbde6ab
-SHA256 (GoogleEarthLinux-4.0.2091.bin) = 237f552ff8aedb808d54e23551cf29019c42c932f4148c12e00b7efdc9ee1308
-SIZE (GoogleEarthLinux-4.0.2091.bin) = 19786344
+MD5 (GoogleEarthLinux-4.0.2414.bin) = f666eca674b77104df9e701cbc0cc206
+SHA256 (GoogleEarthLinux-4.0.2414.bin) = 7b49f2dd3638e3c3f96505035330fd32cf1aef04c639f1c8f4faa11387098097
+SIZE (GoogleEarthLinux-4.0.2414.bin) = 21466938
